---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in the pipeline, API, or dashboard
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. Call endpoint `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error message / traceback if available.

```
paste error here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.10.12 |
| Run mode | batch / streaming / demo / docker |
| Commit SHA | `git rev-parse --short HEAD` |

## Additional Context
Screenshots, log snippets, or anything else that helps reproduce the issue.
